8. ~((provides_take_out(hamden_plaza_subway) & many_negative_reviews(hamden_plaza_subway)) => (rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) & ~provides_take_out(hamden_plaza_subway))) [negated conjecture 7]

13. (~rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) | provides_take_out(hamden_plaza_subway)) & provides_take_out(hamden_plaza_subway) & many_negative_reviews(hamden_plaza_subway) [flattening 12]
17. ~many_negative_reviews(X0) | ~listed_in_yelp(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
18. ~rating_greater_than_four(X0) | listed_in_yelp(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
21. ~popular_among_locals(X0) | rating_greater_than_four(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
22. rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) | popular_among_locals(hamden_plaza_subway) [cnf transformation 6]
23. many_negative_reviews(hamden_plaza_subway) [cnf transformation 13]
27. 1 <=> popular_among_locals(hamden_plaza_subway) [avatar definition]
29. popular_among_locals(hamden_plaza_subway) <- (1) [avatar component clause 27]
31. 2 <=> rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) [avatar definition]
32. ~rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 31]
33. rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) <- (2) [avatar component clause 31]
34. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 22,31,27]
35. ~listed_in_yelp(hamden_plaza_subway) [resolution 17,23]
37. listed_in_yelp(hamden_plaza_subway) <- (2) [resolution 18,33]
38. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 37,35]
39. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 38]
40. rating_greater_than_four(hamden_plaza_subway) <- (1) [resolution 21,29]
41. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 40,32]
42. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 41]

s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 39]

s4. ~1 [rat s3,s2]
s5. # [rat s1,s2,s4]
43. $false [avatar sat refutation s5]
